metadata.title: I Love You, but I Will Not Forgive You
tracklist: 01 To Be Gentle - You Have Left Us, but Shades of Blonde Still Remind Me of You Like Wisps of Love
02 To Be Gentle - I Was Brought to the Water by Bleak and Shimmering Light
03 To Be Gentle - "If You Don't Like What You See When You Look in the Mirror, Don't Look / I Don't Care"
04 To Be Gentle - And I Conceded to the Incessant Noise of Flies and Insects Swarming My Body
05 To Be Gentle - I Love You and I Am Sorry
06 To Be Gentle - To Break the Thought Preemptively
07 To Be Gentle - My Skull-Sized Universe Closes Its Eyes to You
08 To Be Gentle - Callow and Joyous / Repurposed
09 To Be Gentle - Practicing Self-Love / Concepts in Newfound Motion
10 To Be Gentle - What Keeps Me Here When I Don't Feel That I Am Enough to Stay
11 To Be Gentle - Static in My Head / Contributions to a Marred Mental Health
12 To Be Gentle - I Will Not Forgive You
13 To Be Gentle - The Depths of Our Trauma is the Well From Which We Draw Our Compassion
